title: Ore Genesis
description: Adds in More Ores and a lot of other useful items
body:
### OreGenesis - Expand Your World, One Vein at a Time
OreGenesis is a Minecraft mod that breathes new life into your mining adventures by introducing powerful new ores across the Overworld, Nether, and End. Delve deep and discover Sapphire and so much more, a rare and radiant resource found in multiple layers of the world—including Deepslate depths, Nether crusts, and Endstone caverns.

But it’s more than just ore. OreGenesis adds:

- 🪨 New Ores: Sapphire variants generated in each dimension, adding diversity and challenge to mining. With More Coming out.

- ⚒️ Craftable Gear: Forge Sapphire tools, armor, and weapons that rival diamond and netherite with unique traits.

- ✨ Special Items: Unlock progression with custom items and components that enhance enchantments, durability, or crafting.

- 🗺️ Balanced Progression: Seamlessly integrated into worldgen, with ores scaled to biome and depth for exploration rewards.


Whether you're a builder, explorer, or warrior, OreGenesis gives you the resources—and the reason—to go deeper.
